timeline.text: Trump: Iran war core objectives near completion; deal possible but irrelevant — US will leave when regime cannot build nuclear weapon for years
timeline.market: Oil WTI surged past $103 after Trump Apr 1 prime time address

timeline.text: Trump: war could end in 2-3 weeks. Iran demands guaranteed permanent ceasefire. VP Vance in contact with Pakistan intermediaries as ceasefire conduit
Iran demands guaranteed ceasefire to end war permanently. FM Araghchi: no ongoing negotiations, messages exchanged via US envoy Witkoff. Tehran calls Trump deceitful
timeline.market: Oil Brent $105+, WTI $103+ after Trump speech uncertainty

timeline.text: Trump prime time address: war nearing completion but no clear exit timeline. Reiterated nuclear justification. Threatened to blow up Iran energy infrastructure if no deal
timeline.market: S&P 500 futures -0.8 to -1%, Dow futures -0.8% post-speech

timeline.text: Trump frames Strait of Hormuz as allied nations' problem; ceasefire only when strait opened. Iran denies Trump claim president asked for ceasefire
timeline.market: Oil jumped then fell; S&P 500/Dow/Nasdaq futures fell ~1%

timeline.text: Trump posts Truth Social: Iran new leader begged for ceasefire; conditions: Hormuz open free and clear. Tehran denies any such request
timeline.market: Markets rallied pre-speech: S&P 500 +2.9% at open, closed +0.72%

timeline.text: FM Araghchi: no negotiations, no ceasefire sought. Calls for Lebanon to be part of any deal. Iran rejected 15-point US peace plan. Tehran says Trump deceitful about talks
timeline.market: Relief rally ongoing; oil easing on ceasefire speculation

timeline.text: Trump claims US achieved regime change by killing Iran leader. Says Iran agreed to never have nuclear weapon and forgo enrichment
Trump: deal with Iran irrelevant, US will leave when regime cannot build nuclear weapon for years. Threatens to put Iran in stone ages
timeline.market: Markets reacted positively to deal speculation

timeline.text: Trump threatens to blow up and completely obliterate Iran electric plants and oil wells if no deal to end war
timeline.market: Oil spiked on energy infrastructure threat

summary: Day 33 of Iran conflict. Core narrative: Trump claims victory, seeks exit ramp; Iran denies talks, demands permanent ceasefire guarantee. Market in two minds — relief rally when Trump signals wind-down, sell-off when no clear timeline. Oil extremely volatile: fell on ceasefire speculation, surged on Trump speech uncertainty. Key risk: Hormuz Strait remains contested, energy infrastructure threats unresolved.
